title: mutisia splendens
intro: Mutisia splendens, also known as the golden daisy or yellow daisy, is a plant species native to South America, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and fern-like foliage. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Peru and Ecuador, where it has been employed to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Mutisia splendens include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. Herbal preparations of Mutisia splendens include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and other health conditions.
